name: Devbox
description: Installs Devbox by Jetify — a Nix-based isolated development environment tool. Runs 'devbox install' on container creation and exports the project's Nix profile path into login shells so all devbox-managed tools are available without 'devbox run'. On every container start, starts nix-daemon in the background when present (needed for multi-user Nix in devcontainers where systemd doesn't run).

version.description: Version of Devbox to install. Use 'latest' for the most recent release.

exportGlobalProfile.description: When true (default), also exports the global devbox Nix profile (~/.local/share/devbox/global/…/bin) into login shells so globally-installed devbox packages are available everywhere.
